Tests for a SyntaxError when using a return statement inside a do-while loop in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a test script that checks the JavaScript engine's handling of syntax errors. It uses the `eval` function to execute a string of code that contains a `do...while` loop with an illegal `return` statement outside of a function context. The script expects this to throw a `SyntaxError`, which it verifies using a `try-catch` block. If the error is not thrown, the `assert` statement will fail, indicating that the JavaScript engine does not correctly handle this syntax error.
